goal: Recover PR #12's second Gemini/Codex review round and clear Medium+ feedback.
assumptions: Gemini has produced a review for the latest PR head commit.
Unrelated local frontend and documentation edits are user-owned and must not be staged.
The automation remains GitHub Actions event-driven on a self-hosted runner.
risks: GitHub Actions concurrency behavior needs real PR observation after push.
Backend upload validation and S3 copy-source changes need targeted tests.
The settings UI token comment is stale against current HEAD.
steps: Confirm latest Gemini review and cancelled Codex run.
Move Codex Auto Fix concurrency from workflow scope to job scope.
Move S3 copy-source encoding set into S3Storage.
Add regression tests and a permanent constraint.
Verify, commit scoped files, push, and observe PR #12.
